short_source: Local inference benchmarking focuses on latency, throughput, memory, context handling, and response stability across repeated samples. Use deterministic prompts and consistent runtime configuration for fair comparisons.
short_intro: The text below contains one hidden retrieval record (needle) inside background text (haystack).
short_query: Find key {needle_key} in context and return its value exactly.
long_intro: The long context below contains one hidden retrieval record (needle) embedded in the haystack text.
long_query: Find key {needle_key} in context and return its value exactly.
answer_format: Write exactly one line in this format: Answer: <needle_value>. Do not add quotes or punctuation after the value.
